positive: Minimalist vector art of a whimsical forest scene. The composition features stylized, interconnected elements: glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, silhouetted ancient trees with intricate root systems, and gentle floating ethereal orbs. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and touches of glowing lime yellow for contrast. The style should be highly sophisticated, clean line work with crisp negative space, suitable for a modern, high-end apparel print. Central composition, high contrast, flat illustration, vector graphic, perfect symmetry, symmetrical radial symmetry, ethereal mood, magical, joyful.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grain, smudge
